notes.body: Implement: Orientation Checklist + Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales Policy. ALL employees must review and sign Halo Policy by Friday 5/8/26 5:00 PM. Email signed forms to Crystal (DM) by that time. Begin using the Orientation Checklist with ALL new hires today. New hires sign Halo Policy as part of onboarding. Standing: FGU Overdue Rate to 0% by 5/15.
Shopper Dashboard & FGX Info — print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I., post on comm board, Crystal visiting locations this week to discuss in-store. Pair with new Halo Effect rollout.
Steritech ticket has had no response in 4 days. Auto-closes in 4 more days. Reply or close intentionally today.
Past due / due today: Post Period - Inventory Not Posted (5/3); L-Rev (5/4); VO-Rec Performance Foodservice (5/4); VO-Rec BOSS Alpha Ohio Valley (5/4). Clear before 5/5's alert.
